usage_notes: The canonical Play listing icon master is png/icon/ddbd_play_icon_default_512x512.png.
The canonical Play feature graphic master is png/feature/ddbd_feature_graphic_default_1024x500.png.
Do not pre-apply rounded corners or shadows to the Play listing icon.
Keep feature graphic free of screenshots and device frames.
Use raw screenshots for Play listing screenshots; these templates are non-device composition guides only.
Store-media captions should remain short and large enough to survive mobile scaling.
